expectations.text: Saves a resume.md to the workspace's .cs-job-fit-scorer/ folder
Captures the user's preferences (saves preferences.md) since they were volunteered inline
Does NOT attempt to score anything since no JD was provided
expectations.evidence: Response confirms save and invites JD paste, no scorecard

expectations.text: Confirms what was saved and invites the user to paste a JD next
expectations.evidence: Lists captured prefs and prompts for JD
